category_sources: source_facts.description says toolkit for Chinese national cryptographic standards; official GitHub README describes cryptographic algorithms and secure communication protocols.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gmssl; official GitHub README heading uses GmSSL.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best available official documentation surface found for build, features, algorithms, and APIs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/guanzhi/GmSSL, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub topics/README list crypto, TLS/SSL, and SM2/SM3/SM4/SM9 support.
